title: Create: Maximized
description: A melting pot of Create addons with an upcoming quest tree that teach you how they work. Still in development.
body:
The Create mod is among the best mods in all of modern minecraft. Good enough to have tons of addons for itself alone. This modpack will introduce you to many Create addons for you to enjoy.

# What is Create? 
Create is a technology mod based on automation and movement. Create's simple yet complex functions make it the perfect candidate to expand. Using Create, you can automate the production, extraction and refinement of Minecraft's resources at the same time.

Create relies on a thing called rotational force. Rotational force operates on 2 variables: speed and stress. Speed is the rpm of a shaft, and stress is the capacity of a machine before it stops working. Rotational Force is the lifeblood of Create, and Create: Maximized by extension. There are many ways to create Rotational Force.

Create features machines called contraptions. Contraptions are capable of smoothly moving blocks around, and many other functions you can explore, such as mining, cutting down whole trees, farming, the possibilities in Create are truly endless.

# Maximized
A quest tree is available now on versions up to 0.4. Coming to later versions soon.

## External Mods (Not all are present in newer versions):
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/polylib \
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod \

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything \
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fast-leaf-decay \
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks \
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-core \
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark \
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark-delight \
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controlling
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-wooderwheels
The Trackwork 1.20.1 port can be found in [The Official Valkyrien Skies Discord Server](https://discord.gg/8YgtsSfnKA)
